intro: A quiz to learn classical music in a fun way
description:
Can you explain famous classical music pieces?

“You’ve probably heard it somewhere.”
“You know it’s a famous piece.”
But even well-known classical music may have composers, stories,
and musical features that many people don’t really know.

This game is a music knowledge quiz
based on the world of classical music.

Famous composers, stories behind great pieces,
and knowledge about instruments and music.
Based on classical music,
you’ll face quiz questions about famous works and musical knowledge
that you may think you know.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question  
・Choose an answer by intuition  
・Understand instantly with results and explanations  

Even when you answer correctly, there’s still something to learn.
Even when you get it wrong, you’ll discover something new.

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for passing time or refreshing your musical knowledge.

How much of your classical music knowledge still holds up?
Why not put it to the test?

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー
TT supports game streaming by content creators.
Both individuals and companies are free to stream this game,
and no permission from TT is required.
